title: Secret Hunter Manhunt
body:
**==========Manhunt Secret Hunter==========**

Dependency: [https://modrinth.com/plugin/manhunt-compass-plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/manhunt-compass-plugin)

Inspired By Zorato secret hunter series on youtube!

Commands:\
**--Social--**

/alert -> sends an alert with your coordinates.\
/lost -> sends a message requesting for coordinates from other players.\
/emergency -> sends an emergency alert displaying on all players screens and gives you 2 minutes of glowing effect.\
/omw -> says "[Your IGN] is on the way!".\

/accuse -> **Only available if detective is enabled in config** - Detective can use this command once per round to verify whether someone is the hunter or not. If the **detective guessed right**, they **gain 3 hearts** until the end of the round. If the **detective guessed wrong**, then they **die**

**--Config--**

/resethunt -> **IMPORTANT!** - Use right when you load into the world! Puts a 10 block world border, gives everyone effects to make them unable to die, unable to break blocks and clears everyones inventory. (resets the game).\
/starthunt <number> -> starts the game with a 5 second countdown, the number specifies how many hunters there will be.\
/resethuntworld <seed> -> creates a new world in the folder allowing you to select the seed, if you dont select a seed then it will be random.\
/manhuntreload -> reloads the config file in the plugins folder.


Go into your server files -> plugins -> secret hunter -> config.yml
There you have the settings to configure stuff. Will add more configuration soon!

Have Fun!
